都内唯一の屋台ラーメン🍜 ◆チャーシュー麺 (¥950) [トッピング] 味玉 (¥100) 玉ねぎ (¥50) 海苔 (¥50) ほうれん草 (¥100) 八王子にある都内で唯一の屋台ラーメン！ 都心から離れているのに行列のできる人気店 日本ならではの屋台ラーメンは趣のある雰囲気と一度食べたら忘れられない味 カウンター席とテーブル席があるがカウンター席は予約することも可能。(詳しくはお店のアカウントをチェック) ≪店舗詳細≫ 【店舗名】屋台ラーメン しゅんやっちゃん 【住所】東京都八王子市初沢町1277-8  【営業時間】18:00〜23:00 【定休日】月曜・日曜   #東京グルメ #八王子グルメ #屋台ラーメン   ====================================   Tokyo’s Only Yatai Ramen Stand in the City 🍜 ◆ Chashu Ramen (¥950) [Toppings] Ajitama Egg (¥100) Onion (¥50) Nori Seaweed (¥50) Spinach (¥100) A one-of-a-kind yatai-style ramen stand in Tokyo, located in Hachioji! Even though it’s far from central Tokyo, people line up for this incredibly popular spot. This traditional Japanese street-style ramen offers a nostalgic atmosphere and an unforgettable flavor you’ll keep craving. There are both counter and table seats available, and you can even reserve the counter seats in advance. (Check the shop’s account for details!) ≪Shop Information≫ 【Shop Name】Shunyacchan Yatai Ramen 【Address】1277-8 Hatsuzawamachi, Hachioji, Tokyo 【Hours】18:00–23:00 【Closed】Mondays & Sundays   #japanesefood

The Bengal 🐆cat is a unique domestic breed known for its wild leopard-like appearance and highly active personality. Its coat features striking spotted or marbled patterns that resemble a miniature wild cat, making it one of the most visually exotic cat breeds in the world. Despite its wild look, the Bengal is fully domestic and forms strong bonds with its owner. This breed is highly intelligent, curious, and energetic. Bengals enjoy climbing, exploring, and interactive play, and they require mental stimulation to stay happy. They are social cats that can be very affectionate, but they also demand attention and an engaging environment. When properly cared for, the Bengal cat becomes a loyal, entertaining, and dynamic companion 🫶🏼 #bengalcat #bengalkitten #bengalkedisi #bengalcats #fypage

Can you imagine what the world would be like without dentists? Any cavity or small chip in a tooth would turn into a serious problem, something you’d have to deal with using heavy forceps and tears. By the age of 30, most of us would probably be living on applesauce and soups. But thanks to dentists, orthodontists, and medical researchers, the situation has changed dramatically. Today, almost any dental issue can be treated or corrected. And what’s even more impressive - science is already getting close to growing new teeth. So yes, it’s worth simply saying: thank you to people in this profession. Because of them, we can almost not be afraid of sweets. #dentist#medicine#doctor#edit#teeth

한 그릇만 주문해도, 커다란 양푼에서 바로 만들어주는 의정부 비빔국수 📍의정부제일시장 '영선네 잔치국수' (주소: 경기 의정부시 태평로73번길 20 서52호) 🔗네이버 지도 링크: https://naver.me/IGGYPWYs 🥢비빔국수 8천원 의정부 제일시장의 오랜 내공이 담긴 국수 맛집, '영선네'입니다. ​이곳의 인기 비결은 주문 즉시 커다란 양푼에서 사장님이 직접 손맛으로 무쳐주시는 비빔국수입니다. 한자리에서만 무려 20년 동안 변함없는 맛을 이어온 진정한 노포 국수 맛집으로, ​매일 아침부터 점심시간까지는 든든하게 한 끼 식사를 해결하러 오시는 손님들로 발 디딜 틈이 없습니다. ​아삭아삭한 식감의 콩나물이 듬뿍 올라간 비빔국수와 사장님이 직접 정성껏 담그신 열무김치의 조합은 그야말로 일품인데요🤤 입맛 당기는 매콤새콤한 비빔국수를 좋아하시는 분들이라면 꼭 한번 방문해 보세요! - Made in a Giant Mixing Bowl! The Legendary 20-Year Hand-Mixed Spicy Noodles 📍 Yeong-seonne Noodles, Uijeongbu Jeil Market (Address: 20 Taepyeong-ro 73beon-gil, Uijeongbu-si, Gyeonggi-do) 🔗 Map: https://naver.me/IGGYPWYs 🥢 Spicy Mixed Noodles (Bibim-guksu): 8,000 KRW Welcome to 'Yeong-seonne,' a noodle spot in Uijeongbu Jeil Market with years of expertise. The secret to its popularity is the spicy mixed noodles, hand-tossed by the owner in a giant mixing bowl (Yangpun) immediately after ordering. It’s a true hidden gem that has maintained the same delicious taste in the same spot for over 20 years. From early morning through lunch, it’s always packed with locals looking for a hearty meal. The combination of spicy noodles topped with crunchy bean sprouts and homemade young summer radish kimchi (Yeolmu-kimchi) is simply superb! 🤤 If you love mouth-watering, sweet, and spicy noodles, this is a must-visit spot! #서울맛집 #의정부맛집 #koreanfood #seoul #streetfood

Nike and A’ja Wilson did their BIG one on these sneakers😮‍💨💖 @Nike #TeamNike
Nike have finally dropped a NEW Mercurial football boot; the Superfly XI and Vapor XVII! - which pair do you prefer? 👀 #nikefootball #footballboots #soccercleats #mercurial #nikemercurial
Lacing up Nike’s FASTEST ever boot - the Next-Gen Mercurial Superfly ⚡️ #nike #footballboots #footballtiktok #fyp

Are they really back? Yes, absolutely. We exclusively tested both new Mercurial models in Madrid (thanks to @Nike Football and @hubcommnet), as always, we want to give you every possible detail to build your own opinion: visuals, product insights, but most importantly our real feedback after using them on pitch, in matches and during specific training sessions that seriously “stressed” both boots. The new Superfly sends a very clear message as soon as you put it on: innovation built to deliver maximum propulsion. That’s exactly what the forefoot “plate” gives you, an aggressive sense of push and energy return that you can genuinely feel while sprinting. Vapor changes too and the almost “strange” feeling when wearing it for the first time is actually maximum comfort. Not because Mercurial Vapor has never been comfortable, but comfort has probably never been the first thing that comes to mind when thinking about this boot. Other details you’ll definitely want to know: Vapor is the lightest Mercurial ever made at just 130g, while Superfly features a very grippy upper despite being a product fully focused on speed and sprinting. Sizing? Stay relaxed with your usual Nike size, this is 100% true to size. We have a lot more content directly filmed in Madrid coming very soon, so as always, feel free to leave your questions in the comments. There’s a lot more coming... #bootsculture #NikeMercurial #Mercurial #footballboots

Please tell me I’m not the only one doing this at 2 am 😭 Creamy Cheesy Buldak Ramen 🍜🧀🔥 Ingredients 1 pack Buldak ramen 1 slice baby Swiss cheese 1 slice American cheese 1 slice Monterey Jack cheese 2 tbsp mayo Buldak sauce packet Buldak powder packet Chili oil 2 cloves garlic, minced 2 tbsp chopped green onions ½ cup heavy cream or milk Cooked ramen noodles Toppings Fried egg Mini sausages Dumplings Extra green onions Extra chili oil Instructions Cook the Buldak noodles according to package instructions. Drain and set aside. In a pan over low heat, add the baby Swiss, American, and Monterey Jack cheese slices. Add the mayo, Buldak sauce, Buldak powder, minced garlic, and green onions on top. Mix everything together until the cheese melts into a thick spicy paste. Pour in the heavy cream or milk and stir until smooth and creamy. Add the cooked noodles and toss until fully coated in the sauce. Top with fried egg, dumplings, mini sausages, extra green onions, and more chili oil if desired. You can use any toppings you like 🤤 Enjoy hot and creamy 🍜🔥 #buldak #buldakramen #ramen #Foodie #noodles

(영상에 나오는 제가 직접 상담, 무료 현장 방문합니다!) #신안철거 팔로우 해주시고 앞으로도 자주 뵈어요. 감사합니다!😊

매일 새벽 손으로 직접 만드는 수제만두, 젊은 사장님에게서 느껴지는 '할머니의 손맛' 📍망원 연만두  (주소: 서울 마포구 망원로 77 1층 연만두)   🔗네이버 지도: https://naver.me/5Kb3ejlY   🥟만두 한 판 8,500원 / 왕치즈군만두 1개 2,500원   📦택배 신청: 매주 월요일 오후 5시까지 문자 접수 (연락처: 010-5941- 7816)   망원시장의 소문난 만두 맛집 '연만두'. 많은 분이 연세 지긋한 할머니가 운영하실 거라 오해할 만큼 깊은 손맛을 자랑하는 곳입니다. 하지만 이곳의 주인공은 만두에 인생을 건 젊은 사장님이었는데요.  그 깊은 맛의 비결은 진심어린 정성에 있었습니다.  "기계는 재료를 뭉개버린다"는 철학 아래, 매일 새벽부터 나와 모든 재료를 일일이 손으로 버무리고 직접 빚으시더라구요. 재료 하나하나의 식감이 살아있는 꽉 찬 만두 속은 그렇게 사장님의 고집으로 완성됩니다.  워낙 정성껏 소량만 준비하기 때문에 금세 품절되기로 유명한데요. 방문 전 전화 주문이나 네이버 예약을 이용하시면 헛걸음 없이 바로 가져가실 수 있으니 꼭 참고하세요!   주문 즉시 튀겨주시는 치즈 군만두는 갓 튀겨낸 바삭한 식감 속에 고소하게 늘어나는 치즈와 만두 속의 조화가 그야말로 환상적입니다.. 정성과 맛, 어느 하나 빠지지 않는 망원동의 진정한 인생 만두를 만나보세요!   - Deep flavor hand-mixed every dawn: Finding 'Grandmother's Touch' in a Young Master 📍망원 연만두 'Yeon-Mandu' (77, Mangwon-ro, Mapo-gu, Seoul, Republic of Korea)   🔗 https://maps.app.goo.gl/jDhS1Q11mVTn1mBA9   'Yeon-Mandu' is a renowned dumpling spot near Mangwon Market, famous for a deep, traditional flavor that leads many to assume an elderly grandmother must be running the shop. Surprisingly, the true master behind these dumplings is a young man who has dedicated his life to this craft.   The secret to such profound flavor lies in his sincere devotion. Following his philosophy that "machines crush the ingredients' texture," he starts his day in the early hours of the dawn, hand-mixing and folding every single dumpling. This stubborn commitment is what creates the perfect filling, where the texture of each ingredient remains intact and vibrant.   Because each dumpling is made with such meticulous care in limited quantities, they are famous for selling out quickly. We highly recommend placing a phone order or using Naver Reservation before your visit to ensure you don't miss out!  Don't miss the Cheese Fried Dumplings, fried to order for a perfectly crispy texture. The harmony of the savory, melting cheese and the rich dumpling filling is simply heavenly. Come and experience a true "life-changing" dumpling in Mangwon-dong, where passion and tradition meet! 🥟 #서울맛집 #망원동 #koreanfood #seoul #streetfood

Creamy Buldak Ramen 🍝🥟 Ingredients 1 pack Buldak ramen 1–2 tbsp butter 2 cloves garlic, minced 1 tbsp Kewpie mayo Buldak sauce packet Buldak powder packet 1 tbsp chili oil ¾–1 cup heavy cream Mozzarella cheese Dumplings Sausages Green onions Sesame seeds Extra chili oil for topping Instructions Cook the noodles until just al dente, then drain and set aside. In a pan over medium heat, melt the butter. Add minced garlic and sauté until fragrant. Stir in the Kewpie mayo, Buldak sauce, and powder packet. Mix until thick, glossy, and well combined. Add chili oil, then pour in the heavy cream. Stir until smooth and creamy, letting it thicken slightly into that rich orange sauce. Add the noodles and toss until fully coated. Sprinkle mozzarella on top and let it melt into the sauce. Top with dumplings and sausages, cover, and let everything heat through. Finish with green onions, sesame seeds, and a drizzle of chili oil. Use any toppings you love and make it your own 🔥 #buldak #buldakramen #ramenrecipes #creamybuldak #Foodie

This is my mom’s morning skincare routine at 67 years old (1 of 2). Not sponsored, just her  routine explained in more detail. This routine is used on days she’s doing an “everything shower”, on days she washes her hair which is about every other day (3x a week). She has very dry skin. On these days, she does the following:  PREP: Cleanser (@Vanicream™ Sensitive Skin Care) Warm Towel Compress (to prep for face mask, 3x a week)  Optional: Microwave warm towel compress after initial compress and compress again DIY mask (Greek yogurt + raw honey mask; 3x a week), rinsed with just water Ice Water Splash (or cold towel compress; daily) Optional: Sheet mask for 10 to 20 minutes after DIY mask. (She uses sheet masks sparingly on days her skin needs extra TLC; @Dr.Althea US  SKINCARE PRODUCTS (exact product varies by day depending on skin condition): Toner (if applying just DIY mask, no sheet mask) Serum (if applying just DIY mask, no sheet mask) Vitamin C (Goodal Vita C) Moisturizer cream (@epii_global) SPF 50+ (@anua_global) #koreanskincare #aginggracefully #matureskin #dryskin #skincareroutine

Diese One Pot Ramen Dumpling Suppe ist einfach das perfekte Comfort Food bei Regenwetter 🍜🌶️ Zutaten für 2 Personen: 2 EL rote Currypaste 2 EL Erdnussbutter 2 Knoblauchzehen, gepresst ca. 2–3 cm Ingwer, gerieben (hatte keinen da, aber schmeckt besser mit) 400 ml Kokosmilch 800 ml Gemüsebrühe 1 Stange Zitronengras (optional) 2 EL Sojasauce Saft einer Limette 6 vegetarische Dumplings 200 g Ramen Nudeln 200 g Champignons oder braune Pilze 2 Eier, gekocht und halbiert frischer Koriander/Petersilie schwarzer Sesam Chiliöl zum Servieren #einfacherezepte #feierabendküche #wohlfühlessen #nudelliebe #suppenliebe

눈 오는 날 동대문 포장마차에서 먹는 즉석 짬뽕 한 그릇 눈발 날리는 동대문 먹거리장터, 포장마차 천막 안으로 들어갔습니다 아침마다 직접 반죽하고 숙성시킨 면을 주문받으면 그 자리에서 바로 뽑아주십니다 홍합을 아낌없이 넣어야 국물이 시원하다며 건네주신 짬뽕 한 그릇 사모님이 직접 담그신 김치 한 젓가락 올려 호호 불며 먹으니 얼었던 몸이 스르르 풀립니다 [동대문 먹거리장터 유진짬뽕] 📍 위치 서울 종로구 종로40길 6 (동대문역 9번 출구 도보 3분) ⏰ 영업시간 월~토 오전 10시 30분 - 오후 10시 매주 일요일 정기휴무 ※ 재료 소진 시 조기 마감 🎞️ 영상 속 메뉴 즉석 짬뽕 ₩8,000 ※ 촬영일 기준, 가격 변동 가능 - A Bowl of Fresh-made Jjamppong at a Dongdaemun Street Stall on a Snowy Day With snow flurrying in the air, I stepped into a street stall tent at Dongdaemun Meokgeori Market Every morning, they knead and rest the dough, then pull fresh noodles to order right on the spot A generous handful of mussels makes the broth refreshing and tasty, said the owner as he handed me a bowl I topped it with a bite of kimchi the owner's wife made herself, blew on it, and my frozen body melted away [Dongdaemun Meokgeori Market Yujin Jjamppong] 📍 Location 6 Jongno 40-gil, Jongno-gu, Seoul, South Korea (3-min walk from Dongdaemun Station Exit 9) ⏰ Opening Hours Mon-Sat 10:30 AM - 10 PM Closed every Sunday ※ May close early when ingredients run out 🎞️ Featured in the video Fresh-made Jjamppong ₩8,000 ※ Price as of filming date, subject to change #tiktokfood #koreanfood #streetfood #mukjja

Chicken Tortilla Wrap 🌮 Chicken thighs marinated in paprika, dried garlic, dried onion, salt, pepper and olive oil. Leave for at least 30 minutes, then cook until golden. Add cheddar and mozzarella to the tortilla and cook on a pan from both sides until the cheese melts. Sauce: mayo, jalapeños, jalapeño juice, lime juice, paprika, dried garlic and dried onion. Slice the chicken into small pieces and add into the cheesy tortilla with the sauce 🤍 Tortilla con Pollo 🌮 Muslos de pollo marinados con pimentón, ajo seco, cebolla seca, sal, pimienta y aceite de oliva. Dejar marinar mínimo 30 minutos y cocinar hasta dorar. Agregar cheddar y mozzarella a la tortilla y cocinar en la sartén por ambos lados hasta que el queso se derrita. Salsa: mayonesa, jalapeños, jugo de jalapeños, jugo de lima, pimentón, ajo seco y cebolla seca. Cortar el pollo en trozos pequeños y añadir dentro de la tortilla con queso y salsa 🤍 #EasyRecipes #tortillawrap #chickenrecipe #comfortfood #foodblogger

No ad!! ✨Anua RATING by Korean pharmacist 🇰🇷 1️⃣ Heartleaf Pore Control Cleansing Oil ✔️2/10 fragrance is a bit much.  risky for acne-prone skin. 2️⃣Heartleaf Quercetinol Pore Deep Cleansing Foam ✔️8/10 the BHA in this is great for acne anf clogged pores 3️⃣Heartleaf 77% Soothing Toner ✔️6/10 super easy But there’s many alternatives in the market 4️⃣Niacinamide 10 + TXA 4 Serum ✔️3/10 too aggressive for my sensitive skin ,Broke me out😭 5️⃣Azelaic Acid 10 Hyaluron Redness Soothing Serum ✔️10/10 Azelaic acid for redness and bumps, hyaluronic acid to buffer it. Very smart. 6️⃣PDRN Collagen Melting Patch For Glass Skin ✔️2/10 Cute, but no. Topical collagen mostly doesn’t penetrate the skin well. 7️⃣PDRN hyaluronic capsule 100 serum ✔️9/10 You have to try this already on my 4th bottle:)  #skincare #anua @anua_global #kbeautyskincareproducts #anua#beautytips
